untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external data inputs not available in indicator set: (1) Pending news event identification and time-to-event requires calendar/news feed data, (2) Directional bias from technical OR fundamental assessment cannot be expressed without external fundamental data source, (3) Early anticipatory move detection requires real-time news sentiment or order flow data. The core logic of 'weight pending news more heavily than reported news' cannot be mechanically implemented using only price/volume indicators. Attempted proxy with HIGH_VOL regime and short hold period, but this does not capture the essential pending-vs-reported news weighting mechanism.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally dependent on external event calendar data and news sentiment analysis that lie outside the scope of technical indicators. The backtest engine cannot determine: (1) when pending news events exist, (2) time remaining until event, (3) market's anticipatory positioning. Recommend: integrate this rule as a pre-filter in portfolio management layer before position entry rather than as a pure technical backtest rule.
